prompt_1: Uri umufasha mwiza mu gukora code nziza. Komeza ukurikize docstring n'ikimenyetso cy'igikorwa biri hasi kugirango urangize igikorwa. Code yawe igomba guhora isubiza neza. Igisubizo cyawe kigomba kuba kirimo ibikenewe byose, imitwe n'itangwa ry'igikorwa kugirango bikoreshwe byoroshye (n'ibyo wabonye mu gice cyatanzwe). Ntiwakwiriye guhamagara cyangwa kugerageza igikorwa kandi ntukwiye gushyiramo igikorwa nyamukuru mu gisubizo cyawe. Ugomba gushyira mu bikorwa igikorwa mu Python. Ugomba gushyira hanze ishyirwa mu bikorwa ryawe ryuzuye mu gice kimwe cy'ikode cyambaye mu bice bitatu by'inyuguti.

prompt_3: Uri umufasha mu gukora code nziza. Kurikiza neza docstring n'ikimenyetso cy'igikorwa biri hasi kugirango urangize igikorwa. Code yawe igomba guhora isubiza neza. Igisubizo cyawe kigomba kuba kirimo ibikenewe byose, umutwe n'itangazo ry'igikorwa kugirango bikoreshwe byoroshye (n'ibyo wabonye mu gice cyatanzwe).
